arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer exclusive: Thomas Partey contract update as Barcelona 'consider' shock move
arts.sum: Arsenal midfielder Thomas Partey is yet to hold talks with the Gunners over a new contract, but a January exit is off the cards, Charles Watts tells Sports Mole.

arts.ttl: Why are Arsenal wearing an all-white kit vs Manchester United in the FA Cup?
arts.sum: Arsenal will wear their all-white kit, which supports the club’s campaign against knife crime and youth violence, in their FA Cup clash against Manchester United this weekend.

arts.ttl: Sir Alex Ferguson’s opinion is very clear amid Alejandro Garnacho and Kobbie Mainoo updates
arts.sum: Question marks loom about the futures of Manchester United's FA Cup heroes Alejandro Garnacho and Kobbie Mainoo, with the former touted as a makeweight in a deal for PSG's Nuno Mendes

arts.ttl: Support is there for Arsenal but we have ‘limitations’, says boss Mikel Arteta
arts.sum: The Gunners have struggled to turn chances into goals, leading to suggestions they should invest in a new striker.

arts.ttl: ‘Good news’: Journalist shares Arsenal striker transfer update that should ‘bring some joy’ to fans
arts.sum: It’s been a long time since Arsenal signed an out-and-out striker. Kai Havertz arrived at Arsenal 18 months ago, but he’s not a natural centre-forward,...

arts.ttl: The worrying numbers behind Martin Odegaard’s goal drought amid Arsenal’s scoring struggles
arts.sum: Odegaard is yet to score from open play this season and his drop-off in front of goal is a central part of Arsenal’s declining threat

arts.ttl: Arteta has two key Arsenal transfer questions to answer in January
arts.sum: The worry is that there appears to be little sign of that changing and Mikel Arteta therefore has two clear questions to answer. football.london understands that Nico Williams is a player that Mikel Arteta likes and appreciates.

arts.ttl: Nico Williams to Arsenal transfer latest, Edu replacement progress and January window strategy
arts.sum: Arsenal have an opportunity this season with no guarantee that it will come around again, especially with Manchester City looking like they too might strengthen this very winter. Arsenal are always very clear when it comes to the standards they hold when making decisions on major investments.

arts.ttl: Arsenal Alexander Isak transfer plan explained in Mikel Arteta reality check
arts.sum: Gabriel Jesus, Thomas Partey and Oleksandr Zinchenko are three players who have been touted for exits this year, as the Gunners look to raise vital funds for a new centre forward. We can see Arsenal exploring a move for Sesko in the summer, should they raise vital funds with player sales.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim confirms surprise Man United team decision for Arsenal FA Cup clash
arts.sum: Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim has confirmed one player that will start against Arsenal in the FA Cup third-round tie this weekend. "We had time to train, to rest, so I will choose the best team to win because we want also to win the cup.
